channel.title: Soon on Coming soon ...
channel.description: Recent content in Soon on Coming soon ...

item.title: Coming Soon ...
item.description:
A work in progress …

A work-in-progress website.

For a work-in-progress studio.

For a work-in-progress game.

We’re all in various stages of “not done yet.”

Who are we?

By “we,” I mean me. Just me. At least for now. Kevin Schnurbusch.

  • Day job: Software developer at a small company
  • Night job: Asleep, like a normal person
  • Blood moon shifts: Hobby game development

What do we … I mean … I do?

I work on a fantasy game about a young witch who grew up in the wrong universe because of a war against … no spoilers … and an ancient spirit summons her, cause she has the power to unite … no spoilers … She has to fight, explore a new world, explore herself and who she wants to be, deal with loss, love and friendship and how to navigate her reality without completly loosing her mind.
